##SOURCE=Gunnar Farber
##DESCRIPTION=Colorless tabular or prismatic crystals with conchoidal fracture, associated with suzukiite (R150039), walstromite (R150079), and bavsiite.

##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
